SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io.catalog

Interface ICatalogApi

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractSqlApi, Db2SqlApi, H2SqlApi, MsSqlApi, MySqlApi, PgSqlApi
public interface ICatalogApi
Interface for file catalog management operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FileDescriptor
    deleteCatalogEntry(String dsn)
    Deletes a catalog entry based on the dataset name.
    void
    deleteCatalogEntryLinked(String dsn)
    Deletes linked entries related to the specified dataset name.
    boolean
    existsCatalogEntry(String dsn, String catalog)
    Checks if a catalog entry exists for the specified dataset name and catalog name.
    void
    initializeCatalog(boolean create)
    Initializes the catalog.
    List<FileDescriptor>
    listCatalogEntries(String dsn, String catalog)
    Lists catalog entries based on the dataset name and catalog name.
    LinkedList<FileDescriptor>
    listRelatedEntries(String dsn)
    Lists related entries based on the specified dataset name.
    FileDescriptor
    retrieveCatalogEntry(String dsn)
    Retrieves a catalog entry based on the dataset name (dsn).
    FileDescriptor
    retrieveCatalogEntry(String dsn, String catalog)
    Retrieves a catalog entry based on the dataset name (dsn) and catalog name.
    LinkedList<FileDescriptor>
    retrieveLinkedEntries(String dsn)
    Retrieves linked entries related to the specified dataset name.
    void
    storeCatalogEntry(FileDescriptor fdHnd)
    Stores a catalog entry.
    void
    updateCatalogEntry(FileDescriptor fdHnd)
    Updates a catalog entry.

  • Method Details

    • initializeCatalog

      void initializeCatalog(boolean create) throws CatalogException
      Initializes the catalog.
      Parameters:
      create - Flag indicating whether to create the catalog if it doesn't exist.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog initialization.

    • storeCatalogEntry

      void storeCatalogEntry(FileDescriptor fdHnd) throws DuplicatedCatalogEntryException, CatalogException
      Stores a catalog entry.
      Parameters:
      fdHnd - The FileDescriptor representing the catalog entry to be stored.
      Throws:
      DuplicatedCatalogEntryException - If a duplicate catalog entry is encountered.
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry storage.

    • updateCatalogEntry

      void updateCatalogEntry(FileDescriptor fdHnd) throws CatalogEntryNotFoundException, CatalogException
      Updates a catalog entry.
      Parameters:
      fdHnd - The FileDescriptor representing the catalog entry to update.
      Throws:
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry to be updated is not found.
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry update.

    • retrieveCatalogEntry

      FileDescriptor retrieveCatalogEntry(String dsn) throws CatalogEntryNotFoundException, CatalogException
      Retrieves a catalog entry based on the dataset name (dsn).
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to retrieve the catalog entry for.
      Returns:
      The FileDescriptor representing the retrieved catalog entry.
      Throws:
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry retrieval.

    • retrieveCatalogEntry

      FileDescriptor retrieveCatalogEntry(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Retrieves a catalog entry based on the dataset name (dsn) and catalog name.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to retrieve the catalog entry for.
      catalog - The name of the catalog to search for the entry in.
      Returns:
      The FileDescriptor representing the retrieved catalog entry.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry retrieval.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.

    • existsCatalogEntry

      boolean existsCatalogEntry(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogException
      Checks if a catalog entry exists for the specified dataset name and catalog name.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to check for the catalog entry.
      catalog - The name of the catalog to search for the entry in.
      Returns:
      True if the catalog entry exists, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry existence check.

    • retrieveLinkedEntries

      LinkedList<FileDescriptor> retrieveLinkedEntries(String dsn) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Retrieves linked entries related to the specified dataset name.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to retrieve linked entries for.
      Returns:
      A linked list of FileDescriptors representing the related entries.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during linked entry retrieval.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.

    • deleteCatalogEntry

      FileDescriptor deleteCatalogEntry(String dsn) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Deletes a catalog entry based on the dataset name.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name of the catalog entry to delete.
      Returns:
      The FileDescriptor representing the deleted catalog entry.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry deletion.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.

    • deleteCatalogEntryLinked

      void deleteCatalogEntryLinked(String dsn) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Deletes linked entries related to the specified dataset name.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to delete linked entries for.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during linked entry deletion.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.

    • listCatalogEntries

      List<FileDescriptor> listCatalogEntries(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Lists catalog entries based on the dataset name and catalog name.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to list catalog entries for.
      catalog - The name of the catalog to search for entries in.
      Returns:
      A list of FileDescriptors representing the catalog entries.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry listing.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.

    • listRelatedEntries

      LinkedList<FileDescriptor> listRelatedEntries(String dsn) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Lists related entries based on the specified dataset name.
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to list related entries for.
      Returns:
      A linked list of FileDescriptors representing the related entries.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during related entry listing.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.
